<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Logical; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\Coalesce; class CoalesceRemoveLeft extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Logical'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Removes the left side of the coalesce operator.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' return $a ?? $b; // [tl! remove] return $b; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Coalesce::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Coalesce $node */ return $node->right; } }
